Our Process

How It Works

From concept to completion, we make interior design simple and stress-free

01

Free Consultation

Share your vision with our experts. We discuss your style, budget, and timeline.

02

Design Concept

5% Payment

Our designers create personalized 3D renders and mood boards for your approval.

03

Detailed Planning

Precise measurements and material selection with transparent pricing.

04

Execution

60% Payment

Our skilled craftsmen bring your design to life with quality materials.

05

Handover

100% Full Payment

Final walkthrough, quality check, and your dream home is ready to enjoy.

Start Your Project

Customer Reviews

What Our Clients Say

Trusted by 500+ happy homeowners across Bangalore for premium interior design services

"EverySpaces transformed our 3BHK apartment with stunning modular kitchen designs and elegant bedroom interiors. Their attention to detail and use of premium materials exceeded our expectations. Best interior designers in Bangalore!"

Priya Sharma

Koramangala, Bangalore

Complete Home Interior

"We hired EverySpaces for our living room renovation and wardrobe design. The team delivered exceptional craftsmanship with modern aesthetics. Highly recommend for luxury home interiors in Bangalore."

Rajesh Kumar

HSR Layout, Bangalore

Living Room & Wardrobes

"The modular kitchen designed by EverySpaces is both functional and beautiful. They understood our requirements perfectly and delivered on time. Top-rated interior design company in Bangalore!"

Anita Reddy

Whitefield, Bangalore

Modular Kitchen Design

"From false ceiling designs to TV unit installation, EverySpaces handled our entire home renovation project flawlessly. Their 3D visualization helped us see the final result before work began. Amazing experience!"

Suresh Nair

Indiranagar, Bangalore

Home Renovation

"Best decision to choose EverySpaces for our apartment interior design. Their space planning and color consultation were spot-on. Premium quality at competitive pricing. Will definitely recommend!"

Meera Patel

HBR Layout, Bangalore

Apartment Interior Design

"EverySpaces designed our kids' bedroom with creative storage solutions and study area. The team was professional and completed the project within budget. Excellent interior decorators in Bangalore!"

Vikram Rao

Electronic City, Bangalore

Kids Bedroom Design
